lastReleaseMessage: docs: archive overnight bar-raise + canonical-audit reports (06-29 through 07-03)

barRaise.topFinding: v1 stays healthy and functioning; two of three LOW doc-drift items from the last pass closed this run. Full fan-out (three commits after 2026-07-03: fa851e9, 41d5a54 v1.0.1, 9497361). All four hard rules re-verify green (D-002 strip server.mjs:308/437, D-003 bind :140/:514, D-004 no package.json, D-006 stdin :333/:454). Today's canonical audit found zero drift at v1.0.1, with every hardening claim (/healthz, nosniff + x-frame-options DENY, EPIPE guards, EADDRINUSE) verified. maintainability-03 (stale credit date) closed via fa851e9; work-queue-01 (orphaned DESIGN.md edit) shipped in v1.0.1. One LOW remains: the release.ps1:6 carriage return in the usage-comment path. Health holds at 94; nothing broken, no immediately-actionable HIGH or MEDIUM work.

deferred.title: README License line still reads TBD; pick a license for the clone-and-run direction.
